verdict: Crème de la Mer's SPF 15 prioritizes occlusive moisturizing over sun protection with its signature fermented seaweed extract. The low SPF makes this inadequate as a primary sunscreen despite premium positioning and heritage brand status.

_research.name: Crème de la Mer Moisturing Cream SPF 15
_research.con: SPF 15 is insufficient for daily UV protection and cannot replace proper sunscreen.
